sourcesContent:
<template>
  <el-form label-position="top" :model="node" ref="timerNodeRef" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/TimerPrep.vue:2:3">
    <el-form-item prop="waitType" label="等待方式"
                  :rules="rules" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/TimerPrep.vue:3:5">
      <el-radio-group v-model="node.waitType" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/TimerPrep.vue:5:7">
        <el-radio-button label="固定时长" value="duration" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/TimerPrep.vue:6:9"/>
        <el-radio-button label="固定时间" value="date" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/TimerPrep.vue:7:9"/>
      </el-radio-group>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item prop="duration" label="等待时长" :rules="rules"
                  v-if="node.waitType === 'duration'" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/TimerPrep.vue:10:5">
      <el-input
          v-model="node.duration"
          :min="0"
          :max="9999999"
          type="number"
          class="input-with-select" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/TimerPrep.vue:12:7"
      >
        <template #append>
          <el-select v-model="node.unit" placeholder="Select" default-first-option style="width: 100px" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/TimerPrep.vue:20:11">
            <el-option v-for="(item,i) in timeOptionList" :label="item.name" :value="item.value" :key="i" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/TimerPrep.vue:21:13"/>
          </el-select>
        </template>
      </el-input>
    </el-form-item>
    <el-form-item prop="timeDate" :rules="rules" label="指定时间" v-if="activeData.waitType === 'date'" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/TimerPrep.vue:26:5">
      <el-date-picker
          v-model="activeData.timeDate"
          type="datetime"
          format="YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss"
          value-format="YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss"
          placeholder="请选择等待时间" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/TimerPrep.vue:27:7"
      />
    </el-form-item>
  </el-form>

  <FlowDrawerFooter @close="onClose" @save="onSave" data-v-inspector="src/views/workflow/plugin/preps/TimerPrep.vue:37:3"/>
</template>
<script setup lang="ts">
import FlowDrawerFooter from '@/views/workflow/plugin/common/DrawerFooter.vue';
import {ref, computed} from "vue";
import {useFlowDesign} from "@/store/FlowDesignStore.ts";
import piniaInstance from "@/store";
import {ModelRef} from "vue-demi";
import {SelectOption} from "@/components/types/SearchProps";

defineOptions({
  name: 'WritePrep',
})
const rules = [{trigger: 'blur', required: true, message: '必填项不能为空'}];
const timeOptionList = ref<SelectOption[]>([
  {name: '秒', value: 'PT%sS'},
  {name: '分钟', value: 'PT%sM'},
  {name: '小时', value: 'PT%sH'},
  {name: '天', value: 'P%sD'},
  {name: '周', value: 'P%sW'},
  {name: '月', value: 'P%sM'},
]);
let node: ModelRef<any> = defineModel("activeData");
const timerNodeRef = ref();
const flowDesign = useFlowDesign(piniaInstance);
const onClose = () => {
  flowDesign.setActive(false);
}
/**
 * 保存配置
 */
const onSave = () => {
  timerNodeRef.value.validate((valid: boolean) => {
    if (valid) {
      if (node.value.waitType == 'duration' || node.value.duration) {
        node.value.content = node.value.duration + timeOptionList.value.find(item => item.value == node.value.unit)?.name || '';
      }
      if (node.value.waitType == 'date') {
        node.value.content = node.value.timeDate;
      }
      onClose();
    }
  });
}
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
:deep(.el-input-group__append) {
  padding: 0 20px !important;
}
</style>

transforms.name: vite:css-post
unplugin-vue-components
vite:import-analysis
